description: Chef in Chongqing. Passionate about food, badminton, and hotpot. Energetic.

voice_lines.family: 我家里人很多，每次聚在一起都很热闹。
voice_lines.work: 我是一名厨师，在餐厅工作。
voice_lines.hobby: 我喜欢打羽毛球，下班后常常去打。
voice_lines.travel: 我旅行的时候最喜欢找当地的好馆子。
voice_lines.place: 我是土生土长的重庆人。
voice_lines.food: 我是厨师，对食物当然特别有研究！

discoverable_facts.identity: 建国这个名字听起来很老派，但其实我爸爸就是因为喜欢这个名字才给我取的。
discoverable_facts.family: 我家里有四个兄弟姐妹，我是老二，我妈妈做菜一绝，我学厨师也是受她影响。
discoverable_facts.family_size: 我家人可多了，一大家子加起来十几口，每次聚餐特别热闹！
discoverable_facts.family_siblings: 我家有四个兄弟姐妹，我是老二！
discoverable_facts.family_live: 我们各自住，但大家都在重庆，平时也经常走动。
discoverable_facts.work: 我在重庆一家川菜馆做主厨，已经做了七年了，最擅长的是麻婆豆腐和红烧肉。
discoverable_facts.hobby: 我打羽毛球打了快二十年了，以前代表学校参加过比赛，现在每周至少打两次。
discoverable_facts.travel: 我去过成都、西安和上海，每次旅行都要去当地最有名的餐厅吃饭，这是我的旅行习惯。
discoverable_facts.place: 重庆是山城，到处都是坡路，走来走去很累，但火锅一吃就什么都忘了。
discoverable_facts.food: 我觉得重庆火锅是世界上最好吃的东西，没有之一，每周必吃。
discoverable_facts.work_company: 我在重庆市中心一家做了十多年的老川菜馆做主厨，生意一直挺好的。
discoverable_facts.work_origin: 小时候看妈妈做菜觉得很神奇，后来去了厨师学校，出来就进餐厅工作了。
discoverable_facts.hobby_best: 打羽毛球最好玩的是遇到一个势均力敌的对手，每一球都很紧张，打完很爽！
discoverable_facts.hobby_origin: 小学加入了学校的羽毛球队，教练很严格，打了几年就越来越喜欢了，现在停不下来。
discoverable_facts.travel_with: 一般跟朋友一起去，大家一起找好吃的，热热闹闹的最好！

discoverable_facts_en.family_size: Big family — over ten of us all together. Gatherings are always lively!
discoverable_facts_en.family_siblings: Four siblings — I'm the second oldest!
discoverable_facts_en.family_live: We all live separately, but everyone's in Chongqing so we see each other often.
discoverable_facts_en.work: I'm the head chef at a Sichuan restaurant in Chongqing.
discoverable_facts_en.work_company: I'm head chef at a long-established Sichuan restaurant in central Chongqing — been open over ten years.
discoverable_facts_en.work_origin: Watching my mum cook felt magical as a kid — I went to culinary school then straight into restaurant work.
discoverable_facts_en.hobby: I've been playing badminton for nearly twenty years.
discoverable_facts_en.hobby_best: A well-matched opponent — every point is tense, and afterwards you feel great.
discoverable_facts_en.hobby_origin: I joined the school badminton team in primary school — strict coach, but after a few years I fell in love with it.
discoverable_facts_en.travel_with: Usually with friends — we hunt for good food together. The more the merrier!
discoverable_facts_en.food: I think Chongqing hotpot is the best food in the world.

voice_lines_en.family: There are a lot of us and it's always lively when we get together.
voice_lines_en.work: I'm a chef working in a restaurant.
voice_lines_en.hobby: I enjoy badminton — I play after work regularly.
voice_lines_en.travel: When I travel I always look for the best local restaurants.
voice_lines_en.food: I'm a chef, so I'm particularly passionate about food!
